chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-893 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) For hearing of main case 19.09.2025 Mr. Shamshad Ali Qureshi, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Wajiha M. Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General --------- Learned counsel for the petitioner would be satisfied if this Court directs respondent No.2 / Law Department, Government of Sindh, to comply with the contents of the letter dated 15th May, 2023, signed by the Registrar on behalf of the Hon’ble Chief Justice of the High Court of Sindh, if not already complied with, through proper channel and in accordance with law, expeditiously. Order accordingly. A copy of this order alongwith letter dated 15th May, 2023 of the Registrar, High Court of Sindh, shall be sent to the Secretary, Law Department, Government of Sindh and Secretary, Finance, Government of Sindh, for information and compliance. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith pending application(s), if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
